reviews.review_description: The game is great, but the key feature is broken - you can neither save, nor upload your artwork. Without it there is no point in playing since your progress will be lost when you log out. Don’t buy it until the issue is fixed. Some other features are not working as well: boombox, online mode, projection and others.
I love it  but I need a refund, I love this game a lot but it’s hard for new players like me. We need help us get better at this game, I am requesting refund.

This game was fun when it worked, but hasn’t in a year or more. I haven’t experienced any crashes, but the multiplayer is completely broken, as are most of the features of the game. Most options it gives you, just display an error. Bought this a while ago so I can’t even refund it, but if I had the option I would without hesitation. It’s just a broken game that no longer has support.
This is a good game and you can get people to teach you how ti graffiti its worth 15 bucks

I need to get back into the game. My friend who used it all the time did some pieces on the game and I didn’t get to save them in my pictures and he died last week and now I don’t have those memories of him. So fu**ed

I really appreciate the creative tools in the app, but I’m running into a couple of issues. When I spend time creating something and try to save it—or capture images of the result—nothing gets saved. I’m also finding the online connection confusing; the only way I can get connected is by turning off Wi-Fi on my Quest and then reconnecting. Could I be doing something wrong?

But one thing I really hate is that the multi-player is so hard to use and if you want to join a room you have to turn off your wifi then get in the game and then turn it back on please fix this I beg you. But over a it is a great game.

A big part of spray painting is using objects (such as bowls, paper, cups, etc) to get straight lines and curves.

All this has is half baked and heavily pixelated stencils that you can't even layer with (they're not multi layered like 95% of the stencils should be) so no matter what you do they look like 48x48p jpegs

Only reason to get this game is if you have horizon+ and it's free, or if you really want a game to practice free hand graffiti in
The game is cool...when it worked i played it a few days after i bought it it worked but now i try to play it it kicks me out to the home please respond and fix the game because its fun
so when i installed it and gotten the game every time i move my right hand the game freezed and kicked me out for some reason so this is my reviews even though it worked perfectly fine a. Last year

This game was really good compared to other games/apps like it, I do wish there was better connectivity for multiplayer and that you could climb to get up higher on the walls,  it's strong point in my opinion is the paints, nozzle types, and the way the paints react on the "canvas"  and usable and intuitive controls
It still works.

My review scale*
5- Amazing game, while still might not be perfect any flaws are forgivable, is well worth your time
4- Good game, might have a few minor issues or missed opportunities keeping it from being better, but is very playable and still an enjoyable experience
3- Mid tier game, not great but not awful, these games can go either way depending on who you are or what you want or expect out of the game
2- Not a very good game, but not completely broken or unplayable, you might really need to want to play this game to get any enjoyment out of it
1- Awful game, broken or unplayable, I don't see these games being for anyone unless significant updates fix the game

*This is an overly simplified review scale since meta does not allow for half stars so in some cases I may round a game up or down depending on a case by case scenario, 
my reviews are always honest and in no way swayed by anybody else and regardless if I received a game for free or not, these ratings and reviews are however part of a 
campaign for us as consumers to be better about reviewing games and helping bring the games we love the attention they deserve.

It is just the multiplayer that is not so good every time if you want to join your friend, you have to turn your Wi-Fi off and back on and sometimes that doesn’t even work, but that’s the only issue I’ve had with the game besides that I love the game and it’s really fun and good for beginners.￼

reviews.review_title: Good game but needs some updates
reviews.review_description: small lines often unsharp and pixeled, on corners the spray behaves randomly or wont apply on the spot i point at. For practicing its ok, but the real things is more easy 😉🙃 Additionally i need to say that there are Caps that are random or a bit crap. I commonly use Standard Cap and NY Fat Cap, but im a beginner :)
